pages.text:
**NOTARIAL DEED OF DONATION**

**Document ID:** donation_property_005
**Date of Deed:** 21 April 2022
**Place of Execution:** Knokke-Heist, Belgium
**Notary:** Meester Sofie Willems, Notary Public in and for the District of Knokke-Heist

---

**APPEARANCES:**

1. **Hendrik Janssen**, born on 15 March 1948, residing at [insert address], hereinafter referred to as the
"Donor".

2. **Emma Janssen**, born on 28 August 1976, residing at [insert address], and **Lucas Vermeer**, born
on 12 January 1974, residing at [insert address], both hereinafter collectively referred to as the "Donees".

---

**RECITALS:**

WHEREAS, the Donor is the sole owner of an apartment located at Zeedijk 45, 8300 Knokke-Heist,
Belgium, with the cadastral reference of Knokke-Heist, 2nd division, section C, number 1187/K
(hereinafter referred to as the "Property"), which the Donor acquired by virtue of a deed dated 18 June
1998, recorded at the Notary's office;

WHEREAS, the Donor wishes to donate the Property to the Donees, subject to the rights of usufruct and
habitation reserved for himself and, if applicable, his spouse, during their lifetimes;

WHEREAS, the estimated value of the Property for donation purposes is EUR 380,000;

---

**NOW, THEREFORE, the parties agree as follows:**

**ARTICLE 1: DONATION OF THE PROPERTY**

1.1 The Donor hereby donates, grants, and conveys to the Donees, the full ownership of the Property,
subject to the reserved usufruct and right of habitation as provided in Article 2 below.

**ARTICLE 2: RESERVED USUFRUCT AND RIGHT OF HABITATION**

2.1 The Donor reserves to himself and, if applicable, to his spouse, the right of usufruct and right of
habitation over the Property, allowing them to use and occupy the said Property during their respective
lifetimes.

2.2 The Donor retains the right to reside in the Property without any hindrance, including the right to
manage, maintain, and enjoy the Property as if he were the sole owner, until his death.

2.3 The Donees acknowledge that the reserved usufruct and right of habitation shall not be alienated nor
encumbered in any manner, and they shall respect the rights of the Donor herein.

**ARTICLE 3: OBLIGATIONS OF THE DONEES**

3.1 The Donees accept the Property in its current state and shall bear any obligations relating to the
Property arising from the moment of this donation, other than those obligations reserved for the Donor.

3.2 The Donees shall ensure that all necessary maintenance and repairs of the Property are conducted,
thereby preserving its value.

3.3 The Donees shall indemnify the Donor against any claims or liabilities arising from their ownership of
the Property after the execution of this deed.

**ARTICLE 4: TAX AND REGISTRATION**

4.1 The Donees shall be liable for any taxes, duties, or fees associated with the transfer of ownership of
the Property, including but not limited to registration fees and gift taxes, as applicable under Belgian law.

4.2 This deed shall be registered in accordance with the relevant laws and shall be subject to the
statutory formalities required for the donation of real estate.

**ARTICLE 5: ACCEPTANCE OF THE DONATION**

5.1 The Donees hereby accept the donation of the Property, subject to the terms and conditions set forth
herein.

---

**SIGNATURES:**

In witness whereof, the parties have executed this deed on the date first above written.

**Donor:**
_________________________
Hendrik Janssen

**Donees:**
_________________________
Emma Janssen

_________________________
Lucas Vermeer

**Notary:**
_________________________
Meester Sofie Willems
Notary Public in and for the District of Knokke-Heist

---

**This document is executed in triplicate. Each party acknowledges receipt of one original copy.**

**Donor:**
_________________________

_________________________
Lucas Vermeer

_________________________
Meester Sofie Willems
Notary Public in and for the District of Knokke-Heist

---
